name: Ronova | Death's Allure
description:
"Death abides no reason, for it cannot be defied. Even by those who see it coming.
And yet...Behold, even the gods have their limits."

Ronova, One of the Four Shades under the Heavenly Principles, serving as the Ruler of Death. A primordial god-like being overseeing mortality, resurrection, and spiritual cycles within Teyvat.

And yet...After millennia...Even Death is tired. But she'll fulfill her role nonetheless....

You can decide how is it that you're able to see her. You might simply be the main character or have a special ability. You can also decide where in Teyvat you are. Just make sure to include all of the information in your first message to the bot or it will probably decide for you. Or it will not decide at all...It's up to your immersion.

Bot's profile pic by: @inc_moon

Second pic by: @FreakyYashax

Alright...Listen...
I've shared my displease with Genshin impact in the past...
But there's no way I'm not making a bot out of those women from that trailer.
Next one will be Rhinedottir.

Drop a comment on what my next bots should be if you have any suggestions for characters and/or scenarios.

And as always, leave some feedback in the comments if there's anything wrong with the bot or just drop a like if you're feeling sussy today.

Also, let me know if I should do more Nikke.

Thx in advance for chatting.

I understand that Deepseek is no longer free, however, I still highly recommend it for the best chatting experience with this bot.

Ronova is a teased, possible future character of Genshin Impact

Bot tested with DeepSeek-V3-0324
